metadata.name: Handle Truck Arriving for the Wrong Container

description: A truck arrives with an appointment to pick up container A, but they have physically brought container B to drop off.

nodes.task_description: Identify the mismatch between the appointment details (Pickup container A) and the OCR data (Dropoff container B).

expected_outcome.value: The gate system flags a 'Transaction Mismatch' error.

nodes.task_description: Inform the driver of the discrepancy.

expected_outcome.value: Clerk clearly explains that their physical container does not match their appointment.

nodes.task_description: Instruct the driver to exit the gate, contact their dispatcher to get a new, correct appointment for container B, and then return.

expected_outcome.value: Clerk provides clear instructions on how to resolve the problem.
